title: polytrias indica var. nana
intro: Polytrias indica var. nana, also known as Indian fan fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Polytrias indica var. nana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be used to make a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
